properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your name is YAHWEH Your Name is YAHWEH

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In Heaven and The Earth You are Worthy to be Praised

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your Name is Jesus Your Name is Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We give You All the Glory We give You All the Glory

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I give You All the Glory I give You All the Glory

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Call Him Yahweh Oh Oh Oh You are Worthy to be Praised Yah yah yah. Jesus… Jesus
